case_title: OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS VS. ARISTEO B GLORIA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLORIA, ARISTEO B GLORIA, DITAS C. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GLORIA, ARISTEO B

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT GLORIA, ARISTEO B GLORIA, DITAS C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
